verdict.label: FULL_GREEN
verdict.reason: The v0.7.1 TOR @ BOS repeatability canary completed the full lifecycle: official final score Toronto Blue Jays 3, Boston Red Sox 0 was verified; contest 46 was scored; speculation 35 settled to away/upper/Toronto; the winning controlled live-fill and setup seed positions were claimed; final claim sweeps, public commitments/orderbook, and live-MM process checks are zero. The prepared fallback CLE @ MIL setup seed was also scored/settled/claimed after final. Caveats are limited to a not-run restart/cold-start probe and an operator-side polling-filter delay during the live fill window; no extra fills occurred.

capabilities.notes: Primary TOR away @ BOS home contest 46/spec 35 passed pre-live gates; fallback prepared but not used live.
v0.7.1 CLI/SDK and MM SHA/pins verified; heavy setup gates reused because worktree unchanged.
Reserved live maker was clean before start; maker and controlled taker balances/allowances sufficient.
autoApprove false; no new approvals and no unlimited approval creation.
Pre-live quote dry-run for contest 46 returned pipeline=computed and canQuote=true.
9 tiny live commitments posted over the bounded live loop, all target 46/35 only.
Exactly one controlled fill succeeded against live-posted commitment 0xe84032f1… using mm-shakeout-flow-a.
Telemetry captured the fill with source own-state-stream.
Final public/API/MM visible-open exposure is zero and no orphan live MM process remained.
Not run for this live-window artifact; final zero-exposure and process checks were run instead.
Official MLB final score TOR 3, BOS 0 was verified and contest 46 scored.
Speculation 35 settled to away/upper/Toronto Blue Jays.
Winning upper/Toronto live-fill and setup seed positions were claimed; losing lower/Boston positions are no-op.
Tracked live + postgame gas and USDC movement stayed within the low-value canary envelope.

transactions.purpose: Setup handoff created verified contest 46 for TOR @ BOS before the live MM window.
Setup handoff seed/open moneyline fill for speculation 35.
Exactly one controlled live MM fill by mm-shakeout-flow-a against commitment 0xe84032f1a0f3d8a4b92bf6774e0e117fe5fe610bb678c2afa69aecf34709e2e8.
Score contest 46 after official MLB final source showed Toronto Blue Jays 3, Boston Red Sox 0.
Settle speculation 35 to away/upper/Toronto Blue Jays.
Claim ospex-stage-maker-a winning setup seed/open upper/Toronto position.
Claim mm-shakeout-maker-a winning controlled live-fill upper/Toronto position.
Score prepared fallback contest 47 after official final source showed Milwaukee Brewers 9, Cleveland Guardians 4.
Settle prepared fallback speculation 36 to home/lower/Milwaukee Brewers.
Claim ospex-fresh-user winning fallback setup seed lower/Milwaukee position.
